channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Celebrate the Grandeur of America in All Its Splendor
item.description: Our country is a vibrant mix of colors and dazzling displays.

item.title: The Supreme Court's Fourth Amendment Expectations Are Unreasonable
item.description: This is not how protection of clearly defined privacy interests is meant to function.

item.title: The Endurance of Our Declaration of Independence
item.description: America's longevity is due to a shared creed first expressed in its founding document.

item.title: The Unsung Lyrics of 'The Star-Spangled Banner'
item.description: The national anthem's four original verses offer a message of hope.
